summary: Iteration 11: FREE PO extractor + Packing List + Packing Templates + Auto-archive + A4 Production-card PDF — all backend + frontend critical flows verified. Backend 7/7 pytest passed. Frontend Archive toggle (Archive (1) button), Archive panel + DetailModal (PO/Style/Color/Karigar/Stage History all present), POs row Packing-List download (PackingList-2220008835.xlsx) all working. Login redirects to / (not /dashboard) but session OK.
passed: POST /api/pos/extract with synthetic xlsx -> deterministic local extraction (no LLM): po_number=2226000123, po_date=2026-01-15, delivery_date=2026-02-28, client=TEST CLIENT PVT LTD, vendor=SSK FOOTCARE, 3 line_items, subtotal=17000, total_quantity=30

POST /api/packing-lists/job {po_id} -> valid xlsx; A1='PACKING LIST', B2 has SSK FOOTCARE, G3=client, C13=PO#, row 16 has SITE CODE/STYLE/COLOUR/CTN/PCS-CTN/TOTAL PCS/NET WT/GROSS WT, row 17+ has line items
POST /api/packing-lists/job {po_id, job_ids:[id]} -> xlsx returned + packing_generated_at flag set on that job
GET /api/packing-templates -> [], POST with valid xlsx (b64) -> persisted, DELETE -> 200; POST with non-xlsx blob -> 400

Auto-archive: PATCH stage->dispatched + POST invoices/job + POST packing-lists/job -> job removed from default GET /api/production/jobs; GET ?include_archived=true returns it with archived=True; GET /api/production/archive includes it
POST /api/production/card.pdf -> %PDF; page size exactly 595x842 pt (A4); extracted text contains 'SSK FOOTCARE MANUFACTURING LLP', 'PROCESS TALLY', 'KARIGAR', 'SIZE BREAKDOWN'
Frontend archive view: archive-list rendered, 1 archive-details button present; click opens detail-modal containing PO/Style/Color/Karigar/Stage History tokens
Frontend /pos: packing-<po_number> green button per PO row; click downloads .xlsx (PackingList-2220008835.xlsx) with no errors

issues: Login form posts and navigates to '/' instead of '/dashboard'; works fine functionally (sidebar appears, session valid) but the redirect should normalize to /dashboard for consistency with credentials doc.

critical_code_review_comments: po_extractor_free.py PO# regex requires the value to START WITH A DIGIT (pattern [0-9][0-9A-Z\-_/]{4,}) — fully alphabetic POs like 'TEST-PO-001' will NOT extract. For SIYARAM / current vendors all POs are numeric so this is fine, but consider broadening the first regex for safety: [A-Z0-9][A-Z0-9\-_/]{3,}.

po_extractor_free.py 'Buyer:' / 'Vendor:' regex match starting capital + 3-80 chars — works for current customers, but may swallow trailing free text on the same row (the openpyxl flat representation uses ' | ' as separator which acts as a stop). Keep an eye when extracting from PDFs with right-aligned address blocks.
server.py has now grown to >2200 lines — strongly recommend splitting into modules (pos, packing, production, invoices, reports, payroll, auth) for maintainability.

Frontend dispatched packing-btn-* could not be visually clicked in active board because the only dispatched job got auto-archived (correct behavior). Manual self-test by main agent: temporarily set a job to dispatched without generating invoice and confirm a green Packing List button renders alongside Invoice on its color-group card.
Login redirects to '/' instead of '/dashboard' — minor UX inconsistency.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4/4 critical flows verified; dispatched-card Packing button code-only, not visually exercised because all dispatched jobs are correctly auto-archived)

seed_data_creation: Test PATCH'd 1 existing production job through dispatched stage, generated invoice + packing list — that job is now archived (visible in Archive (1) panel). TEST_CLIENT_X packing template was created & deleted; final state clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 11 deliverables verified. To re-test dispatched packing-btn-<key> visually, pick a non-archived production job, PATCH stage=dispatched (without then generating invoice+packing) and confirm the green button renders on its dispatched color-group card. Backend test runner: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration11.py -v.
